torch_pattern:
# part 2 of distributed RMSNorm: stats = all_gathered per-device sum(x^2) tiles
sumsq = stats.sum(dim=-1, keepdim=True)
var = sumsq / hidden_size
out = inp * torch.rsqrt(var + eps)
out = out * weight

config_template.program_config: ttnn.LayerNormShardedMultiCoreProgramConfig(compute_with_storage_grid_size=({GRID_X},{GRID_Y}), subblock_w={SUBBLOCK_W}, block_h={SEQ}//32//{GRID_Y}, block_w={HIDDEN}//32//{GRID_X}, inplace=False)  # only when input is sharded

weight_transform: gamma loaded as-is (no transpose); reshape [HIDDEN] -> [1,1,HIDDEN//32,32] or padded TILE layout, replicated across mesh devices (each device normalizes its own activation shard with full gamma slice it owns)
applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: distributed rmsnorm part-2 decomposition observed in unit tests (golden_src not registered); replaces the contiguous subsequence [sum(stats) -> div(hidden) -> add(eps) -> rsqrt -> mul(x) -> mul(gamma)]; constraints: ['must be preceded by ttnn.rms_norm_pre_all_gather + ttnn.all_gather(stats, dim=3)', 'stats tensor width is 32*num_devices (one tile column per device)', 'weight required; no bias (RMSNorm)']

placement_observations.source: call_site: all_gather(tt_stats, dim=3, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) directly feeding rms_norm_post_all_gather
test_example: rms_norm_post_all_gather(tt_input_tensor, program_config=SHARDED_NORM_PRGM_CFG, stats=tt_stats_tensor, memory_config=out_memory_config); model call_site with self.sharded_progcfg

condition.value: prefill (no program_config, compute_kernel_config only, optional use_2d_core_grid)

placement_observations.source: call_site: rms_norm_post_all_gather(inp, tt_stats_gathered, epsilon, weight, compute_kernel_config=..., use_2d_core_grid=use_2d_grid)

memory_config.shard_spec_template: or sharded matching out_memory_config when sharded program_config used

condition.value: bfloat8_b in traced/perf paths, bfloat16 in accuracy paths

placement_observations.source: test_example: dtype=ttnn.bfloat8_b, memory_config=output_memory_config (trace capture test); call_site: dtype=ttnn.bfloat16 with sharded_progcfg
